content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift: SecureField-based Sign In) but demo credentials are placeholders (`demo_user.txt: "test"`, `demo_password.txt: "changeme"`) and `notes.txt` only contains "TBD".

Pierre: Apple reviewers cannot access core functionality behind a login wall without working credentials and clear instructions — placeholder values like "test"/"changeme"/"TBD" almost guarantee a rejection under 2.1 for "app not fully functional". Please provide a real, working demo account and replace notes.txt with actual steps explaining how to sign in and reach the app's key features (and mention any 2FA or special setup needed).
